\tzpentry{ID3891}{Fisher Field Strength Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3891 introduces Fisher Field Strength Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{ij}^{\text{Fisher}} = \mathbb{E}\left[\frac{\partial \log \mathcal{L}(\mathbf{x}|\theta)}{\partial\theta^i} \frac{\partial \log \mathcal{L}(\mathbf{x}|\theta)}{\partial\theta^j}\right] \end{equation}
